mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orinuno_parse_request ( request_hash, request_json, status, phase, progress_decoded, progress_total, result_content_ids, error_message, retry_count, created_by, created_at, started_at, finished_at, last_heartbeat_at ) VALUES ( #{requestHash}, #{requestJson}, #{status}, #{phase}, #{progressDecoded}, #{progressTotal}, #{resultContentIds}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{lastHeartbeatAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orinuno_parse_request WHERE request_hash = #{hash} AND status IN ('PENDING','RUNNING') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM orinuno_parse_request WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE orinuno_parse_request SET status = 'DONE', phase = 'DONE', result_content_ids = #{resultContentIds}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, last_heartbeat_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE orinuno_parse_request SET status = 'FAILED', phase = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, last_heartbeat_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE orinuno_parse_request SET status = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= #{maxRetries} THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'PENDING' END, phase = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= #{maxRetries} THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'QUEUED' END, retry_count = retry_count + 1, error_message = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= #{maxRetries} THEN COALESCE(error_message, 'stale RUNNING reached max retries') ELSE error_message END, finished_at = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= #{maxRetries} THEN #{staleBeforeTs} ELSE finished_at END WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND last_heartbeat_at < #{staleBeforeTs}
